name: v07-ws-echo
description: v0.7 PR 2 demo — WebSocket trigger echo handler. Mounted on the same Hono server as HTTP routes via the shared-app multiplex pattern (PR 1 foundation + PR 2 trigger). On `connect` the workflow sends a greeting; on each `message` it replies with the same payload wrapped in `{event: 'echo', original: <payload>}`. Smoke validates the end-to-end flow: open WS to /ws/echo, send `{event: 'hello', data: {hi: 'there'}}`, expect a 'connected' greeting + an 'echo' response. The trigger handles the upgrade, parses the JSON envelope, and dispatches the workflow once per message via the same runner pipeline as HTTP triggers — middleware chain, ctx.connection API, full Studio tracing.
